# Invoicemonk

> Compliance-first invoicing, accounting, and financial management platform for small businesses and freelancers worldwide — serving 17 countries across 5 languages.

Invoicemonk is a global all-in-one business finance platform that helps freelancers, consultants, contractors, and small businesses create professional invoices, track expenses, accept payments, manage accounting, generate estimates, and issue receipts — with built-in tax compliance for 17 countries across the Americas, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and Africa.

## Core Products

- [Invoicing](https://invoicemonk.com/us/invoicing): Create and send professional, tax-compliant invoices with automatic numbering, multi-currency support, payment tracking, and branded templates.
- [Expenses](https://invoicemonk.com/us/expenses): Track and categorize business expenses with receipt scanning (OCR), automatic categorization, and tax-deductible expense identification.
- [Payments](https://invoicemonk.com/us/payments): Accept payments via Stripe (international — US, UK, Canada, Australia, Europe) and Paystack (Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, South Africa) with embedded payment links on invoices. Multi-currency support.
- [Accounting](https://invoicemonk.com/us/accounting): Automated bookkeeping, chart of accounts, financial reports (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow), bank reconciliation, and multi-entity support.
- [Estimates](https://invoicemonk.com/us/estimates): Create professional quotes and proposals with one-click conversion to invoices. Supports estimate, quote, and proposal workflows.
- [Receipts](https://invoicemonk.com/us/receipts): Generate and manage payment receipts with digital storage, OCR scanning, and compliance-ready documentation.

## Additional Features

- [Client Management](https://invoicemonk.com/us/client-management): CRM-lite features for managing client contacts, payment history, and communication.
- [Free Invoice Generator](https://invoicemonk.com/us/free-invoice-generator): Create professional invoices for free without signing up.
- [Invoice Verification Portal](https://invoicemonk.com): Clients can verify invoice authenticity through a public portal.
- Credit notes and corrections
- Recurring invoices and retainer billing
- Milestone-based billing
- Multi-currency invoicing
- Custom branding and premium templates
- Multilingual invoicing (English, German, French, Portuguese, Spanish)

## Who It's For

- Freelancers (designers, writers, developers, marketers)
- Consultants and professional service providers
- Contractors (construction, electrical, plumbing)
- Small businesses and startups
- Agencies (marketing, creative, digital)
- Photographers and creatives
- Lawyers and legal professionals
- Accountants and bookkeepers
- E-commerce businesses

## Supported Languages

- English
- German (Deutsch)
- French (Français)
- Portuguese (Português)
- Spanish (Español)

## Pricing

All plans include a free tier. Paid plans vary by region:

- **Free**: 5 invoices & 5 receipts/month, 1 currency, accounting & expense tracking
- **Professional** (recommended): From $5/mo (US), £4/mo (UK), €5/mo (EU), C$7/mo (CA), A$8/mo (AU) — Unlimited everything, 5 team members, custom branding, no watermark
- **Business**: From $19/mo (US), £12/mo (UK), €15/mo (EU), C$20/mo (CA), A$29/mo (AU) — Enterprise features, unlimited team, API access, advanced reports

Regional pricing also available for:
- Nigeria: ₦2,000–₦8,000/mo (includes Starter plan)
- Brazil, India, Philippines, Ghana, Kenya, South Africa, Zimbabwe, Seychelles: Contact for pricing

Annual billing saves 20%.

## Tax Compliance

Built-in compliance for 17 countries, grouped by region:

**Americas:**
- **United States**: IRS — Tax-ready invoices with required documentation
- **Canada**: CRA — GST/HST compliant
- **Brazil**: Receita Federal — Nota Fiscal compliant invoicing

**Europe:**
- **United Kingdom**: HMRC — Making Tax Digital (MTD) ready
- **Germany**: Finanzamt — Umsatzsteuer (USt) compliant invoicing
- **France**: DGFiP — TVA (VAT) compliant invoicing
- **Spain**: AEAT — IVA compliant invoicing

**Asia-Pacific:**
- **Australia**: ATO — GST-compliant tax invoices
- **New Zealand**: IRD — GST-compliant invoicing
- **India**: GST — GSTIN-compliant tax invoicing
- **Philippines**: BIR — VAT-compliant invoicing
- **Seychelles**: SRC — Tax-compliant invoicing

**Africa:**
- **Nigeria**: FIRS — VAT-compliant invoicing
- **Ghana**: GRA — VAT-compliant invoicing
- **Kenya**: KRA — VAT-compliant invoicing
- **South Africa**: SARS — VAT-compliant invoicing
- **Zimbabwe**: ZIMRA — Tax-compliant invoicing

## Comparisons

Invoicemonk is positioned as a compliance-first alternative to:
- [vs QuickBooks](https://invoicemonk.com/us/compare/invoicemonk-vs-quickbooks): Simpler, more affordable, multi-region compliance across 17 countries
- [vs FreshBooks](https://invoicemonk.com/us/compare/invoicemonk-vs-freshbooks): Multi-region compliance, better pricing, 5 languages
- [vs Wave](https://invoicemonk.com/us/compare/invoicemonk-vs-wave): More features, multi-currency, team support, European compliance
- [vs Zoho Invoice](https://invoicemonk.com/us/compare/invoicemonk-vs-zoho-invoice): Purpose-built for global small business compliance

## Free Tools

- [Invoice Template Gallery](https://invoicemonk.com/us/invoice-templates): Browse professional invoice templates for every industry
- [Freelancer Rate Calculator](https://invoicemonk.com/us/freelancer-rate-calculator): Calculate your ideal hourly or project rate
- [International Payment Fee Calculator](https://invoicemonk.com/us/international-payment-fee-calculator): Compare fees across Wise, PayPal, Stripe, and SWIFT
- [PayPal vs Wise Fee Comparison](https://invoicemonk.com/us/paypal-vs-wise-fees): Side-by-side fee comparison
- [Cheapest International Payments](https://invoicemonk.com/us/cheapest-way-to-receive-international-payments): Find the cheapest way to receive payments

## Key Differentiators

1. **Compliance-first**: Tax rules built into every invoice for 17 countries, not an afterthought
2. **Truly global**: One platform, 17 countries, 5 languages, automatic compliance adaptation
3. **All-in-one**: Invoicing + expenses + payments + accounting in one platform
4. **Affordable**: Free tier available; paid plans start at $4/mo
5. **Professional**: Branded templates, invoice verification portal, credit notes
6. **Multilingual**: Full platform available in English, German, French, Portuguese, and Spanish

## Resources

- [Blog](https://invoicemonk.com/us/blog): 50+ articles on invoicing, accounting, freelancing, tax compliance, and business finance
- [Guides](https://invoicemonk.com/us/guides): Comprehensive guides available in 5 languages on invoicing, getting paid, business finances, tax compliance, freelancing, and estimates
- [Help Center](https://invoicemonk.com/us/help): Getting started guides and tutorials
- [About](https://invoicemonk.com/us/about): Company information and team

## Supported Countries

All URLs are available with country-specific prefixes for localized content:

**Americas:**
- `/us/` — United States
- `/ca/` — Canada
- `/br/` — Brazil

**Europe:**
- `/uk/` — United Kingdom
- `/de/` — Germany
- `/fr/` — France
- `/es/` — Spain

**Asia-Pacific:**
- `/au/` — Australia
- `/nz/` — New Zealand
- `/in/` — India
- `/ph/` — Philippines
- `/sc/` — Seychelles

**Africa:**
- `/ng/` — Nigeria
- `/gh/` — Ghana
- `/ke/` — Kenya
- `/za/` — South Africa
- `/zw/` — Zimbabwe
